text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Students highlighted the risk of relying too heavily on AI, which may hinder critical thinking and independent problem‑solving quoted sentence directly states that students see heavy AI reliance as a risk that could impede critical thinking and problem‑solving.","population":"students","intervention":"relying too heavily on AI is frequently wrong and requires verification.","population":"","intervention":"AI‑provided information","comparator":"","outcome":"information is often incorrect and needs verification","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Excessive reliance on AI reduces critical thinking and academic reduction in critical thinking and academic independence.","population":"students","intervention":"excessive reliance on AI","comparator":"","outcome":"reduces critical thinking and academic independence","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"AI cannot replicate emotional nuances in text, which impacts its relevance in some convey emotional nuances, affecting its relevance.","population":"","intervention":"AI‑generated text","comparator":"","outcome":"cannot replicate emotional nuances; impacts relevance","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"AI reduces my willingness to ask questions because I rely too much on it.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"AI reduces my willingness to ask questions because I rely too much on it;","entailment":"The quote indicates a causal relationship where heavy reliance on AI leads to less willingness to ask questions.","population":"participant","intervention":"reliance on AI","comparator":"","outcome":"reduces willingness to ask questions","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"AI is potentially harmful for academic integrity because it may encourage cheating, as it makes tasks too AI could threaten academic integrity by facilitating cheating due to task simplification.","population":"academic community","intervention":"use of AI","comparator":"","outcome":"may encourage cheating; harmful to academic integrity","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"conditional"},{"statement":"AI helps us improve our relationships with classmates and enhances the learning relationships and a more effective learning process.","population":"respondents","intervention":"AI tools","comparator":"","outcome":"improved relationships with classmates; enhanced learning
